queries.question: Provide all the musicians, jazz and rock, who have been performing for a decade.
queries.sql:
SELECT Artists.name 
FROM Artists JOIN Artist_genre ON Artists.id = Artist_genre.artist_id JOIN Genres ON Genres.genre_id = Artist_genre.genre_id
WHERE (Genres.name = "Jazz" OR Genres.name = "Rock") AND Artist_genre.years_in_industry = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?artist_genre a :Artist_genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?artists p:name ?name .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?artist_genre p:years_in_industry ?years_in_industry_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Jazz" || STR(?name_w2) = "Rock")) && (STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10" || STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10.0")))
}

queries.question: Show all the jazz performers, and only those rock artists who have been playing for 10 years.
queries.sql:
SELECT Artists.name 
FROM Artists JOIN Artist_genre ON Artists.id = Artist_genre.artist_id JOIN Genres ON Genres.genre_id = Artist_genre.genre_id
WHERE Genres.name = "Jazz" OR Genres.name = "Rock" AND Artist_genre.years_in_industry = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?artist_genre a :Artist_genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?artists p:name ?name .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?artist_genre p:years_in_industry ?years_in_industry_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Jazz" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Rock" && (STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10" || STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide all the jazz musicians and rock guitarists who have been performing for 10 years.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?artist_genre a :Artist_genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?artists p:name ?name .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?artist_genre p:years_in_industry ?years_in_industry_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Jazz" || STR(?name_w2) = "Rock")) && (STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10" || STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10.0")))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?artists a :Artist .
  ?artist_genre a :Artist_genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasArtists ?artists .
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?artist_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?artists p:name ?name .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?artist_genre p:years_in_industry ?years_in_industry_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Jazz" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Rock" && (STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10" || STR(?years_in_industry_w) = "10.0"))))
} }
}
